data.title: Henan JinMa Energy Extends Coke Supply Agreement with Maanshan Steel
data.description:
Confident Investing Starts Here:

  • Easily unpack a company's performance with TipRanks' new KPI Data for smart investment decisions
  • Receive undervalued, market resilient stocks right to your inbox with TipRanks' Smart Value Newsletter

Henan JinMa Energy Co. Ltd. Class H ( (HK:6885) ) just unveiled an update.

Henan JinMa Energy Co. Ltd. has announced a new agreement with Maanshan Steel Group, revising and extending their existing framework for coke supply due to increased demand. The 2025 Maanshan Steel Framework Agreement will adjust the existing cap for 2025 and extend the partnership until 2027, pending shareholder approval. This move highlights the company’s strategic positioning to meet growing market demands and maintain its role as a key supplier in the steel industry.

More about Henan JinMa Energy Co. Ltd. Class H

Henan JinMa Energy Co. Ltd. is a company based in China, operating within the energy sector. It is primarily involved in the production and sale of coke, a crucial component in steel manufacturing, and has a significant market focus on supplying this product to steel companies, such as Maanshan Steel Group.

Average Trading Volume: 122,484

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

Current Market Cap: HK$289.1M

data.title: Carbine Resources Announces Rights Issue to Fund Silica Sand Projects
data.description:
Confident Investing Starts Here:

  • Easily unpack a company's performance with TipRanks' new KPI Data for smart investment decisions
  • Receive undervalued, market resilient stocks right to your inbox with TipRanks' Smart Value Newsletter

Carbine Resources Limited ( (AU:CRB) ) has provided an update.

Carbine Resources Limited has announced a pro-rata non-renounceable rights issue to raise approximately $1,103,476, offering 2 fully paid ordinary shares for every 3 shares held by eligible shareholders. The funds from this entitlement offer will be used for ongoing exploration and development activities at their Muchea West and Down South Silica Sand Projects, as well as for business development and general working capital. Additionally, the company plans to issue 10,000,000 options to Taylor Collison Limited as part of a broker offer.

More about Carbine Resources Limited

Carbine Resources Limited is involved in the mining industry, focusing on exploration and development projects. The company’s primary activities include the Muchea West and Down South Silica Sand Projects, where they are progressing with mining approvals and conducting field reconnaissance, sampling, and auger drilling.

Current Market Cap: A$1.66M
